Helijet Charters : Learjet 31A

Helijet’s Learjet 31A is a fast, efficient and practical jet charter alternative to commercial airline schedules, lineups, connections, cancellations, and limited destination options. Don’t waste a business or recreation opportunity – be where you want to be, exactly when you want to be there.

Helijet’s fast and luxurious Learjet 31A is a high-speed solution for up to six passengers.

• Serving hundreds of convenient airports
• Comfortable, convenient terminal lounge
• Free on-site parking
• No check-in line-ups and baggage hassles
• Be wheels-up within 30 minutes of checking in
• Executive seating for up to six
• Full inflight internet and phone access
• Configurable for air medical transport

When you fly Helijet’s Learjet 31A – or any of the other aircraft in Helijet’s extensive fleet of aircraft –  for business or pleasure, the options, destinations and possibilities are endless.

How can we help you?

For additional information about jet charters or a quotation please contact us at:
charters[at]helijet.it.com or call 1-800-987-4354 (between 6 a.m. and 7 p.m. PST)[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][image_with_animation image_url=”4080″ image_size=”full”   • Configurations – corporate passenger or air medical
  • Cabin Volume – 271 cu ft
  • Cabin Width – max 4′ 10″
  • Cabin Height – 4′ 4″
  • Cabin Length – 12′ 9″
  • Passengers – 6 (corporate configuration)
  • Baggage Volume – 40 cu ft
  • Tail Locker – 12 cu ft
  • Max Takeoff Weight – 17700 lbs
  • Max Payload (useful load) – 4000 lbs
  • Cruise Speed – 800kmh
  • Max Range (w/Full Fuel) –2960km
  • Fuel Capacity – 2550 litres
  • Fuel Consumption – 770 litres per hour
